title: Same Tree
coreIdea: Determine if two binary trees are structurally identical with the same node values, by recursively comparing corresponding nodes in both trees simultaneously.
recognitionCues: asks if they are identical in structure and values
approach: Base cases: if both nodes are null, return true; if only one is null, return false. Otherwise, return true only if current values match AND left subtrees match AND right subtrees match (recursively).
